info.name: 31. Use Case - Registrasi Mata
info.description:
For **complete repository for all SATUSEHAT use-cases** please access our public workspaces : [Postman Workspaces](https://s.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) For **detailed SATUSEHAT use-cases import link** please see : [Postman Public Kemkes Link](https://link.kemkes.go.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) Any information about SATUSEHAT FHIR Profile could be accessed through [Simplifier FHIR Profile](https://simplifier.net/guide/SATUSEHAT-FHIR-R4-Implementation-Guide/Home/FHIRProfiles?version=current) | Tanggal | Riwayat Perubahan | **Penanggung Jawab** | | --- | --- | --- | | 4 Nov 2024 | Versi Pertama - API berdasarkan playbook Registrasi Mata V1.0 | Anisatul Afifah

Thomas Chaidir

Supported by CHAI |

item.name: Tingkat Kesadaran

response.name: Observation - Tingkat Kesadaran

item.description:
**Resource :** `Observation` **Action :** Melaporkan Data Tingkat Kesadaran Pasien **API Method :** `POST` Data elemen minimal `Observation` yang perlu dikirim sebagai berikut : | **Path/Elemen** | **Keterangan** | | --- | --- | | `Observation.identifier.use` | Official | | `Observation.identifier.system` | [http://sys-ids.kemkes.go.id/observation/{{organization-satusehat-id}}](http://sys-ids.kemkes.go.id/observation/%7B%7Borganization-satusehat-id%7D%7D) | | `Observation.identifier.value` | Nomor ID hasil pemeriksaan yang disimpan di masing-masing RS | | `Observation.status` | Final | | `Observation.category.coding.syatem` | [http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category](http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category) | | `Observation.category.coding.code` | vital-signs | | `Observation.category.coding.display` | Vital Signs | | `Observation.code.coding.system` | [http://loinc.org](http://loinc.org) | | `Observation.code.coding.code` | Kode LOINC Pemeriksaan **(e.g. 67775-7)** | | `Observation.code.coding.display` | Display pemeriksaan **(e.g. Level of responsiveness)** | | `Observation.subject` | Patient/ID SATUSEHAT Pasien | | `Observation.encounter` | Referensi ID Encounter | | `Observation.effectiveDateTime` | Tanggal pemeriksaan dilakukan
(timeStamp with zone dengan format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss+zz:zz → UTC+00:00) | | `Observation.performer` | Practitioner/ID SATUSEHAT Nakes | | `Observation.valueCodeableConcept.coding` | Hasil pemeriksaan kategorik |

item.name: 07. Kondisi Meninggalkan Rumah Sakit (Update Meninggal)

response.name: Encounter - Update (Meninggal)

item.description:
**Resource:** `Encounter`

**Action:** Mengupdate encounter/kunjungan, update pasien meninggal

**API Method:** `PUT`

Data elemen minimal `Encounter` yang perlu dikirim sebagai berikut:

| Path/Elemen | **Keterangan** |
| --- | --- |
| `Encounter.identifier.system` | [http://sys-ids.kemkes.go.id/episode-of-care/{{Org_ID}}](http://sys-ids.kemkes.go.id/episode-of-care/%7B%7BOrg_ID%7D%7D) |
| `Encounter.identifier.value` | nomor registrasi di masing-masing RS |
| `Encounter.status` | in-progress |
| `Encounter.class.system` | [http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActCode](http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActCode) |
| `Encounter.class.code` | IMP |
| `Encounter.class.display` | inpatient encounter |
| `Encounter.episodeOfCare` | ID EpisodeOfCare |
| `Encounter.subject` | Patient/ID SATUSEHAT Pasien |
| `Encounter.participant.type.coding.system` | [http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ParticipationType](http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ParticipationType) |
| `Encounter.participant.type.coding.code` | ATND |
| `Encounter.participant.type.coding.display` | attender |
| `Encounter.participant.individual` | Practitioner/ID SATUSEHAT Practitioner |
| `Encounter.period.start` | Jam kedatangan |
| `Encounter.location` | Location/No ID Location |
| `Encounter.diagnosis.condition` | Condition ID diagnosis primer |
| `Encounter.diagnosis.use.coding.system` | [http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/diagnosis-role](http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/diagnosis-role) |
| `Encounter.diagnosis.use.coding.code` | AD |
| `Encounter.diagnosis.use.coding.value` | Admission diagnosis |
| `Encounter.diagnosis.rank` | 1 |
| `Encounter.statusHistory.status` | arrived |
| `Encounter.statusHistory.period.start` | Jam kedatangan |
| `Encounter.statusHistory.status` | in-progress |
| `Encounter.statusHistory.period.start` | Jam pelaksanaan pemeriksaan/tindakan |
| `Encounter.statusHistory.status` | finished |
| `Encounter.statusHistory.period.start` | Jam selesai pemeriksaan/tindakan |
| `Encounter.hospitalization.dischargeDispotition.coding.system` | [http://terminology.kemkes.go.id/CodeSystem/discharge-disposition](http://terminology.kemkes.go.id/CodeSystem/discharge-disposition) |
| `Encounter.hospitalization.dischargeDispotition.coding.code` | exp-lt48h |
| `Encounter.hospitalization.dischargeDispotition.coding.display` | Meninggal < 48 jam |
| `Encounter.hospitalization.text` | Informasi tambahan |
| `Encounter.serviceProvider` | Organization/ID SATUSEHAT Fasyankes |
